subtasks.description: Extract company details (name, address, registration/tax ID, business type), primary contact information (name, title, email, phone), and banking details (account holder name, account number, routing/sort code, bank name, SWIFT/BIC) from the vendor onboarding form in one pass.

plan.cost_rationale: Single document extraction task with a well-defined schema across three related categories (company, contact, banking). No cross-source reconciliation or multi-step inference needed. Assigned small tier: the extraction is straightforward field mapping with no inference required beyond standard OCR/document parsing. One subtask is sufficient and minimal—all requested fields can be extracted in a single pass by the extract specialist.
